records.m_Talk_ENG: Her pulse grows ever fainter. The first aid equipment won't sustain her much longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. This isn't something we can treat with pyramid power anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ganz ruhig. Das k9582nnen wir sowieso nicht mit Pyramidenpower behandeln.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Du calme. Des blessures pareilles, ce n'est pas le pouvoir des pyramides qui va y faire quelque chose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The nearest hospital big enough to treat her is where we took Emma. That's where we have to go.
